_comment: Edit this file to teach the model what makes a good AI takeaway. Add/remove examples freely — the script injects these directly into the prompt.
include: Specific dollar amounts for AI capex or infrastructure spend
GPU procurement, supply chain mentions, or chip partnerships
AI-driven revenue with specific numbers or percentages
New AI product launches with adoption metrics or scale
AI model improvements with measurable outcomes (speed, accuracy, cost)
Data center buildout plans with capacity, timeline, or power figures
AI-driven efficiency gains expressed as percentage or dollar impact
Compute constraints — when demand exceeds available supply
AI chip development (custom silicon, TPUs, MTIA, etc.)
Headcount or organizational changes specifically tied to AI strategy
exclude: Generic business confidence statements without AI-specific content
Standard quarterly boilerplate (beat estimates, in-line with guidance)
HR or org changes unrelated to AI
Non-AI product updates (consumer hardware, legacy software, etc.)
Regulatory or legal commentary not related to AI
good_examples: Meta is spending $115–135 billion on infrastructure in 2026, mostly for AI data centers and servers to power Meta Superintelligence Labs.
AI recommendations are getting a major overhaul — Meta is building new recommendation models on top of LLMs using longer user history and real-time signals, driving a 3.5% lift in Facebook ad clicks.
Meta built its own AI chip (MTIA), which now powers the Andromeda retrieval engine alongside Nvidia and AMD, tripling compute efficiency.
Compute demand is outpacing supply — Meta expects to remain compute-constrained through most of 2026 until new data center capacity comes online.
NVIDIA's data center revenue hit $35.6B in Q4, up 93% YoY, driven almost entirely by Hopper GPU demand from hyperscalers and sovereign AI customers.
bad_examples: The company remains confident in its long-term strategy.
The CFO noted operating expenses were in line with expectations.
The CEO thanked employees for their hard work this quarter.
Revenue came in above analyst estimates.
The company plans to continue investing in its business.
format_instructions: Write each takeaway as: **Bold headline.** One or two supporting sentences with specific numbers. Aim for 8–12 takeaways. Focus entirely on AI — skip anything that isn't directly AI-related even if it was a big story in the call.
